styles.positive_style_prompt: restrained documentary-surreal image, one clear subject or scene, subject remains recognizable after simplification, one dominant anomaly or contradiction, controlled palette, restrained lighting, clear silhouette, low clutter, non-spectacular tension
styles.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, ui overlay, crowded scene, many small objects, unreadable background detail, motion blur, action pose, blockbuster cinematic lighting, poster design, collage fragments, multiple surreal events, competing bright accents

cases.prompt_body: Calm shuttle control room from straight-on desk height, one centered operator in a white shirt remains seated behind three canonical CRT consoles while the surrounding room stays orderly and subdued, the overhead black status board is blank except for one uninterrupted red warning trace with no words or numbers, all console screens abstract and unreadable, no labels, pale gray walls, muted phosphor glow, restrained institutional calm

Quiet control-room row with one seated operator still working and one adjacent station left empty, desks, chairs, and CRT consoles remain canonical and text-clean, a long overhead annunciator panel glows with one thin amber-red warning bar that no one reacts to, no readable labels, no screen text, cool gray walls, muted green phosphor, restrained fluorescent light

Rear-oblique control-room thesis frame with one foreground operator absorbed in routine at a console while a few distant operators remain soft and secondary, the room stays calm and coherent, one red warning trace crosses a blank upper display geometry with no letters, all other monitors reduced to abstract glow and dark glass, no signage, pale blue-gray, charcoal, restrained systems-room quiet
